name: Pastramized Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the salt, saltpeter, black pepper, brown sugar, and ginger together.
2. Rub the mixture into the beef brisket, pressing it evenly throughout the meat.
3. Place the seasoned beef in a pan and cover it closely.
4. Refrigerate or store in a very cool place for 3 weeks, turning occasionally.
5. After 3 weeks, smoke the beef over a barbecue pit or in a smokehouse at very low heat for 4 hours.
6. Store the smoked beef in a cool place; it will keep well for some time.
7. To prepare, cover with cold water and cook until tender. The cooking time depends on how long the beef was previously smoked. A large goose can also be treated this way to make a delicious treat.
